sourceList.title: Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - THIEBAUT (-Basel [4 Dec 1310/7 Feb 1311]).
Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - THIEBAUT de Ferrette, son of ULRIC [II] Comte de Ferrette [Pfirt] & his second wife Agnes de Vergy (- Basel [4 Dec 1310/7 Feb 1311]).

zh.lifeSummary: 當Theobald de Ferrette I於1227年出生在法國豪吉爾費瑞迪時，他的父親Ulrich II de Ferrette28歲，母親Elisabeth de Chalons de Bourgogne28歲。他於1253年10月與Agnes de Vergy在瑞士阿高可林瑙結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1297年在法國阿爾薩斯被列為landvogt。他去世於1310年12月12日在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 瓦倫多福瓦德斯洛巴塞爾享年83歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Theobald de Ferrette I于1227年出生在法国豪吉爾費瑞迪时，他的父亲Ulrich II de Ferrette28岁，母亲Elisabeth de Chalons de Bourgogne28岁。他于1253年10月与Agnes de Vergy在瑞士阿高可林瑙结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1297年在法国阿爾薩斯被列为landvogt。他去世于1310年12月12日在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 瓦倫多福瓦德斯洛巴塞爾享年83岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ferrette
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Aldo, Antonio, Carlo, Dante, Domenic, Quinto, Alessandro, Attilio, Carmello, Caesar, Cosimo, Cosmo.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of a diminutive of   Ferro  .

variants.name: Ferretiz
meanings: Hispanic (Mexico; Ferrétiz): probably an altered form of Italian Ferretti , influenced by the Spanish patronymic suffix -ez.

variants.name: Ferro
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Antonio, Angelo, Mario, Pasquale, Alberto, Antonino, Bernardo, Guido, Carmine, Concetta, Dino, Ottavio, Pietro, Rocco.  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Luis, Carlos, Ramon, Eduardo, Fermin, Sixto, Angel.

Italian, Spanish, Portuguese, and Maltese: from ferro ‘iron’ (from Latin ferrum), used as a nickname denoting someone who was strong or as a metonymic occupational name for someone who produced or worked iron.
Italian: from a medieval personal name, preserved in the modern pet form Ferruccio.

nameMeanings.name: Theobald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from þeud ‘people, race’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. The first element was altered under the influence of Greek theos ‘god’. This name was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Theobald de Ferrette I was born in 1227, in Ferrette, Haut-Rhin, France, his father, Ulrich II de Ferrette, was 28 and his mother, Elisabeth de Chalons de Bourgogne, was 28. He married Agnes de Vergy in October 1253, in Klingnau, Aargau, Switzerland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. In 1297, at the age of 70, his occupation is listed as landvogt in Alsace, France. He died on 12 December 1310, in Basel, Wadersloh, Warendorf, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, at the age of 83.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Theobald de Ferrette I est né en 1227, à Ferrette, Haut-Rhin, France, son père, Ulrich II de Ferrette, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth de Chalons de Bourgogne, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Agnes de Vergy en octobre 1253, à Klingnau, Argovie, Suisse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. En 1297, à l’âge de 70 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est landvogt à Alsace, France. Il est décédé le 12 décembre 1310, à Basel, Wadersloh, Kreis Warendorf, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 83 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Theobald de Ferrette I 1227 in Pfirt, Haut-Rhin, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ulrich II de Ferrette 28 und seine Mutter Elisabeth de Chalons de Bourgogne 28. Er hat im Oktober 1253 in Klingnau, Aargau, Schweiz Agnes de Vergy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1297, als er 70 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als landvogt in Elsaß, Frankreich aufgeführt. Er starb am 12. Dezember 1310 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Basel, Wadersloh, Kreis Warendorf, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Theobald de Ferrette I è nato il nel 1227 nel Ferrette, Haut-Rhin, Francia, il suo padre, Ulrich II de Ferrette, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Elisabeth de Chalons de Bourgogne, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Agnes de Vergy nel ottobre 1253, nel Klingnau, Argovia, Svizzera. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Nel 1297, all'età di 70 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come landvogt nel Alsace, Francia. Morì il 12 dicembre 1310, nel Basel, Wadersloh, Kreis Warendorf, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania, all'età di 83 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Theobald de Ferrette Iが1227年にフランスハウト-ルヒンフエレットで生まれた時，父Ulrich II de Ferretteは28歳，母Elisabeth de Chalons de Bourgogneは28歳であった。1253年10月にスイスアールガウクリングナウでAgnes de Vergyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。1297年，70歳の時，フランスアルサスでの職業はlandvogtと記録されている。彼は1310年12月12日にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクレイス ワーエンドルフワダースロバセルで83歳で死去した。

ko.Basel, Warendorf, Nordrhein-Westfalen, G: 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 크레이스 워도르프 웨이더슬로 바셀
ko.lifeSummary: Theobald de Ferrette I(이)가 1227년 프랑스 하트-히 페렛에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ulrich II de Ferrette(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Elisabeth de Chalons de Bourgogne(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1253년 10월 스위스 아아르가 클링나에서 Agnes de Vergy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1297년, 70세의 나이로 그의 직업은 프랑스 알사스에서 landvogt이었다. 그는 1310년 12월 12일 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 크레이스 워도르프 웨이더슬로 바셀에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Theobald de Ferrette I nasceu em 1227, em Ferrette, Haut-Rhin, França, seu pai, Ulrich II de Ferrette, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth de Chalons de Bourgogne, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes de Vergy em outubro de 1253, em Klingnau, Aargau, Suiça. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Em 1297, com 70 anos, sua profissão aparece como landvogt em Alsace, França. Ele faleceu em 12 de dezembro de 1310, em Basel, Wadersloh, Kreis Warendorf, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha, com 83 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Theobald de Ferrette I родился в 1227 г. в местности фирретт, хаут-рин, Франция, его отцу по имени Ulrich II de Ferrette было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth de Chalons de Bourgogne, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes de Vergy октябрь 1253 г. в местности клингнау, ааргау, Швейцария. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. В 1297 году, в возрасте 70 лет,  он работал по профессии landvogt в местности алсеис, Франция. Он умер 12 декабря 1310 г. в местности беисел, вадирслох, крис варендорф, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия в возрасте 83 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Theobald de Ferrette I nació en 1227, en Ferrette, Haut-Rhin, Francia, su papá, Ulrich II de Ferrette, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Elisabeth de Chalons de Bourgogne, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Agnes de Vergy en octubre de 1253, en Klingnau, Aargau, Suiza. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. En 1297, a la edad de 70 años, su ocupación registrada era landvogt en Alsace, Francia. Murió el 12 de diciembre de 1310, en Basel, Wadersloh, Kreis Warendorf, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania, a la edad de 83 años.
